executiveSummary: The ADE - PF Stock semantic model has a health score of 67/100 (Grade B). It contains 8 tables (2 DirectQuery, 4 Dual), 28 measures, and 5 relationships (1 bidirectional). BPA detected 139 findings (1 high, 1 medium). DAX analysis found 0 FILTER(ALL) anti-patterns and 0 measures generating 5+ SQL subqueries.

topFindings.title: 1 Bidirectional Cross-Filter Relationships
topFindings.description: 1 relationships use bidirectional cross-filtering. In DirectQuery mode, each can double the number of SQL queries per visual.
topFindings.recommendation: Change to single-direction unless explicitly required. Use CROSSFILTER() in specific measures if needed.
topFindings.estimatedImprovement: 30-50% reduction in SQL queries for affected visuals.
tradeoffs: May break visuals relying on cross-filter direction

topFindings.title: 1 Wide Tables (>50 columns)
topFindings.description: 1 tables have >50 columns. In DirectQuery, all columns are included in generated SQL.
topFindings.recommendation: Audit unused columns and remove from model. Consider narrow serve views.
topFindings.estimatedImprovement: Proportional reduction in read_bytes per query.
tradeoffs: Column removal requires coordination with report authors

topFindings.title: 124 Unused Column Candidates
topFindings.description: 124 columns not referenced in any DAX measure. Candidates for removal to reduce DQ payload.
topFindings.recommendation: Audit columns, verify not used in visuals/slicers, remove confirmed unused.
topFindings.estimatedImprovement: Cost reduction — fewer bytes read per query.
tradeoffs: Some may be used in visuals or bookmarks

topFindings.title: 10 Pass-Through Serve Views (>50 cols, no filter)
topFindings.description: 10 dbt serve views are SELECT * pass-throughs with >50 columns and no WHERE filter.
topFindings.recommendation: Create narrow serve views selecting only columns used by PBI measures.
topFindings.estimatedImprovement: 60-70% reduction in read_bytes for affected tables.
tradeoffs: Must audit PBI column usage before narrowing

actions.action: 10 Pass-Through Serve Views (>50 cols, no filter)
